titleStmt.title: Letter from Charles Benson to the Royal College of Physicians of Ireland, 17 February 1916
Letters 1916-1923
titleStmt.author: Charles Molyneux Benson

editionStmt.p: This work was originally published by Maynooth University in Ireland in 2017. In 2026 this data, stored in a relational database was extracted and converted into this TEI/XML document.

availability.p: This is an open access work licensed under Creative Commons Attribution NonCommercial 4.0 International license (CC BY-NC 4.0).

note.p: Letter from Charles Molyneux Benson (1877-1919) to the Royal College of Physicians of Ireland (RCPI) informing the college that the recommended changes to the constitution of the Conjoint Board have been adopted by the Royal College of Surgeons of Ireland (RCSI).

msIdentifier.repository: Royal College of Physicians of Ireland

correspAction.placeName: Royal College of Surgeons, Stephen's Green, Dublin, Ireland
Royal College of Physicians, Kildare street, Dublin, Ireland

projectDesc.p: The data in these XML files was generated based on a data dump from the Magellan database (https://github.com/Maynooth-Center-for-Digital-Humanities/Magellan). Each database record has been converted to a JSON file (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/json). The element section of the JSON file contains the TEI-encoded contents of the letters. The TEI XML has been cleaned and made well-formed using a Python script (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/src).

body.ab:
Royal College of Surgeons in Ireland. Dublin Febr. 17th 1916 TPC Kirkpatrick Esq
Registrar
Royal College of Physicians Dear Sir, In reply to your letter of the
7th inst. I am directed by the
President, Vice President & Council
to inform you that the Report
of the Conference Committee as
amended by the Royal College of
Physicians has been adopted
by this College. I am, Sir,
Yours faithfully C.M. Benson.
Secretary to Council. Macd.C.
3.III.16
